capabilities.heading: A vertically integrated film & bag manufacturer.

items.desc: Mono- and multi-layer blown film extrusion across LDPE, LLDPE, HDPE and barrier resins — up to 5 layers.
items.title: Film extrusion & co-extrusion

items.desc: Bag conversion, sealing, slitting, gusseting, die-cutting and assembly — all under one roof.
items.title: Converting & OEM finishing

items.desc: In-line flexo printing up to 8 colors with photographic-grade registration and ink kitchen color matching.
items.title: Flexographic printing

items.desc: In-house lab testing for gauge, seal strength, drop, migration, surface resistivity and chemical compatibility.
items.title: Quality & compliance

items.desc: Post-consumer recycled resins, biodegradable additives and mono-material redesigns for recyclability.
items.title: Sustainable materials

items.desc: Direct container shipping from Kaohsiung and Ho Chi Minh ports — DDP, CIF and FOB to 30+ markets.
items.title: Global logistics

capabilities.lead: Six integrated capability areas — from polymer to finished, printed, packed bag — so customers can specify a single OEM partner from extrusion to export.

cta.heading: Bring your bag program to a Taiwan-grade manufacturer.
cta.lead: Send us your spec sheet, target markets and annual volume. A packaging engineer responds within 48 hours with feasibility and an indicative quote.

success.message: A packaging engineer will respond within 48 hours with a feasibility note and indicative quote.
success.title: Brief received.

footer.description: A Taiwan-based plastic bag manufacturer producing specification-grade poly bags for industrial, foodservice, healthcare and security applications since 1995.

hero.eyebrow: Engineered Poly Bag Manufacturing · Est. 1995 · Tainan, Taiwan
hero.h1: Plastic packaging, engineered for the industries that depend on it.
hero.lead: La Party manufactures specification-grade poly bags for industrial, food service, healthcare, mailer and security packaging — from two integrated sites in Tainan and Binh Duong, Vietnam.

capabilities.footnote: Two plants. 12,000+ tons of film processed annually. ISO 9001 certified.

process.heading: From spec sheet to container loaded — typically in 49 days.
process.lead: A structured four-phase program with defined SLAs, sample approval gates and a single program manager from kickoff through shipment.

steps.desc: Send us your bag dimensions, material, gauge, print and volume forecast. We respond in 48h with feasibility & quote.
steps.title: Brief & Spec

steps.desc: Physical samples and print proofs delivered within two weeks. Iterate on material, seal type and artwork.
steps.title: Sample & Approve

steps.desc: Film extrusion, printing, bag conversion and 100% QC inspection — with batch traceability.
steps.title: Extrude & Convert

steps.desc: Container loading at Kaohsiung or Ho Chi Minh and door-to-door logistics with live tracking.
steps.title: Pack & Ship
